title: INNER JOIN gives the results of a CROSS JOIN
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE foo (key_var INTEGER NOT NULL, value_var2 REAL DEFAULT NULL);
CREATE TABLE bar (key_var INTEGER NOT NULL, value_var1 TEXT DEFAULT NULL);
SELECT * FROM foo INNER JOIN bar ON foo.key_var = bar.key_var;
key_bug_features: INNER JOIN behaves like a CROSS JOIN
